name: Cross Valley
description_short: Cross Valley Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union offering mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and deposit accounts with competitive rates and local lending expertise.
description_long:
Cross Valley Federal Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving its community through traditional credit union products and services. The organization emphasizes local lending relationships and community involvement, as evidenced by their commitment to financial literacy programs, scholarship offerings, and community care initiatives. Their website prominently features fraud prevention education and security alerts, indicating a focus on member protection.

Cross Valley offers a comprehensive range of financial products including home mortgages (purchase, refinance, and specialty properties), auto loans with flexible terms and 90-day payment deferral options, personal loans for debt consolidation starting at 7.50% APR, student loans, credit cards with rewards programs, share certificates, and home equity products (loans and HELOCs). They also provide business lending services through their Merchant Lending Pro product line, which enables business customers to offer financing to their own customers.

The institution differentiates itself through the Cross Valley Edge membership rewards program, which offers a 1.00% APR loan discount for members. They emphasize personalized service through local branch locations (including a newly opened Mocanaqua branch as of July 2024) and appointment scheduling options. The credit union actively invests in member education and community support programs, including $2,500 annual scholarships and financial literacy initiatives targeting student members.

As a federally-insured credit union (NCUA-insured), Cross Valley provides the safety and member-protection characteristics standard to the credit union model. Their competitive positioning relies on rates, member benefits, and community ties rather than technology innovation. For consumers seeking traditional credit union services with local relationship banking, Cross Valley presents a viable option, though the website content does not provide sufficient detail about specific rate competitiveness, membership eligibility requirements, or detailed product terms.
services: Home mortgages (purchase, refinance, investment properties, vacation homes)
Home equity loans and home equity lines of credit (HELOCs)
Auto loans with competitive rates and 90-day payment deferral
Personal loans for debt consolidation with rates from 7.50% APR and 72-month terms
Credit cards with rewards and premium benefits
Share savings accounts and share certificates
Cross Valley Edge membership rewards program with loan discounts
Business lending through Merchant Lending Pro
Financial literacy programs and educational resources
Online banking platform with login access
pros: Member-owned, not-for-profit structure with NCUA insurance protection
Cross Valley Edge membership program offers 1.00% APR loan discount on qualifying loans
Auto loans include 90 days of no payments option for flexibility
Personal loan debt consolidation rates starting at 7.50% APR with up to 72-month terms
Active community investment including $2,500 annual scholarships and financial literacy programs
Multiple branch locations with appointment scheduling available
Comprehensive product suite from mortgages to business lending (Merchant Lending Pro)
cons: Website does not clearly display membership eligibility requirements or geographic service area limitations
No specific APR ranges published for mortgages, auto loans, or home equity products—requires direct inquiry
Limited transparency on approval criteria, processing times, or loan decision timelines
Business lending (Merchant Lending Pro) product details are incomplete on the website
No mention of online application completion or digital closing options for mortgages
best_for: Community members seeking relationship-based banking with local lending expertise
Borrowers interested in auto refinancing with flexible payment deferral options
Homebuyers and homeowners seeking mortgages and home equity products with personalized guidance
Members prioritizing credit union safety and community-focused financial institutions over national banks
diagnosis: Cross Valley Federal Credit Union is best for consumers in their service area seeking traditional credit union membership with local relationship banking, competitive rates, and community-focused values. Primary caveat: the website lacks specific rate transparency and membership eligibility details, requiring direct contact with the credit union to compare rates and confirm service availability before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Cross Valley — Credit Union in Wilkes Barre, PA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Cross Valley — NCUA-insured credit union in Wilkes Barre, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
